title: Lush Seared Korean Tuna Bowl
description: A cultured, pillowy date-night dish featuring seared tuna in a char-grilled tangy pineapple sauce served in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Pat the tuna steak dry and season both sides with salt and pepper.
Heat a cast-iron or grill pan over high heat until smoking and sear the tuna for 1 minute per side for a rare center.
In a small bowl whisk together pineapple juice, soy sauce, sesame oil, gochujang, honey, and rice vinegar to create the glaze.
Brush the glaze over the seared tuna and let it rest for 30 seconds.
Meanwhile, spread steamed rice in the bottom of a Korean brass bowl.
Top the rice with the seared tuna, cucumber julienne, and sliced green onion.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the bowl, drizzle any remaining glaze, and serve immediately.
Enjoy the contrast of charred tuna, sweet pineapple, and crunchy veggies in one elegant bowl.
